positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a maximalist mandala pattern formed by intertwined celestial elements. The main subjects include stylized crescent moons, constellations, and geometric flora (like blooming lotus petals). Use a deep indigo and vibrant gold color palette, contrasted sharply with matte obsidian black accents. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and clean linework, emphasizing symmetry and strong, graphic silhouettes. The overall composition must be highly scalable and read well as a single, cohesive print on fabric. Focus on intricate detailing that translates cleanly and crisply.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, trademark, graffiti, low detail, artifacts, excessive shading, amateur, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, noise
